exercises.title: Application Requirements Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze requirements for different quantum internet applications.
tasks: Define a set of quantum internet applications
hints: Many apps share common building blocks

exercises.title: Classical vs Quantum Capability Comparison
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive comparison tool for network capabilities.
tasks: Define metrics for both network types
hints: Classical has copying, quantum has entanglement
Include classical communication in quantum protocols

exercises.title: Quantum Internet Impact Calculator
exercises.description: Model the impact of quantum internet on various industries.
tasks: Model finance, healthcare, government, research sectors
Calculate potential value from quantum applications
hints: Consider both direct and indirect benefits

exercises.title: Vision Timeline Modeler
exercises.description: Model the development timeline for quantum internet capabilities.
tasks: Include current state of the art
exercises.expectedOutput: Timeline projection and critical path analysis
hints: Repeaters are critical path for long-distance
Integration often takes longer than components
Consider both optimistic and conservative scenarios
